description.value:
Your ancestry has a powerful connection to one or more magical traditions.

Choose one 1st-rank spell from your ancestry's magic entry. You can cast that spell as an innate spell once per day as a 1st-rank spell. If this is your 9th level ancestry feat, choose a 3rd-rank or lower ancestry spell as a 3rd-rank innate spell. If this is your 13th level ancestry feat, choose a 5th-rank or lower ancestry spell as a 5th-rank innate spell. If this is your 17th level ancestry feat, choose a 7th-rank or lower ancestry spell as a 7th-rank innate spell. This spell has the same tradition that is listed in the feat entry.

Special If you have multiple spells listed for your ancestry, you can select this feat more than once. If you do, you must select a different spell.
